notes: Futures inch higher and oil halts its surge after Thursday's oil-driven Mag-7 rout (-$797B); VIX eased 19.6->18.8. Still fragile with Big Tech weak, so nudging to neutral 0.4 while keeping deep landmines (TSLA -22.9%, PLTK -15.4%, META -7%, EHGO -14.5%) off the buy list.
journal_entry: Fri 7/24 09:00: lifted from risk-off 0.3 to neutral 0.4 as oil surge stalls and futures firm, VIX 19.6->18.8. TSLA/PLTK/META/EHGO still bleeding landmines; CVI reports next week. Watching inflation data, Warsh testimony and whether the oil/Iran relief holds.
